effects.effect: At the end of this round, each hero not already adjacent to one or more undead is beset by two **rotting zombies** who burst up from the ground to appear in adjacent unoccupied spaces. Each zombie is winded. This feature can't be used two rounds in a row.
Up to three unattended objects on the encounter map rise to float 1 square off the ground. Each object is then pulled 5 squares toward the nearest enemy within 3 squares of the object.
Ravenous and rotting undead arms burst forth from 9 connected squares of a vertical or horizontal surface. Any creature who ends their turn adjacent to an affected square makes an **Agility test**.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: While restrained this way, a creature takes 1d6 damage at the start of each of their turns.

Up to four undead in the encounter move up to their speed and can make a free strike. The number of undead affected increases by 1 for each additional Malice spent on this feature. If an undead is reduced to 0 Stamina during this dread march, they don't die until the march is resolved.
The undead activates a Malice feature available to undead of level 9 or lower.

effects.tier1: 10 corruption damage; the target loses 2 Recoveries
effects.tier2: 8 corruption damage; the target loses 1 Recovery
effects.effect: The undead attempts to rend the vitality of their foes. Each enemy within 5 squares of the undead makes a **Might test**.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target who has fewer Recoveries than they would lose is also weakened (save ends).

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: This ability can't be used by a minion.
The undead activates a Malice feature available to undead of level 3 or lower.

One undead acting this turn uses a signature ability against a creature who is bleeding. As a free triggered action, each undead within 5 squares of the first undead moves up to their speed and can make a free strike against the same target.
The undead activates a Malice feature available to undead of level 6 or lower.
Until the end of the round, whenever an undead is reduced to 0 Stamina, they deal 8 corruption damage to each enemy within 3 squares of them.

features.name: Feeding Frenzy
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If a target made bleeding this way is already bleeding, they are instead knocked prone and can't stand until the end of their next turn.
The blood-starved vampire has speed 10 while any creature within 10 squares of them is bleeding. The vampire must use Feeding Frenzy against a bleeding creature on their turn if they are able to.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The bonecage can have up to four size 1 targets grabbed at once. Any creature grabbed by the bonecage takes a bane on the Escape Grab maneuver, and the bonecage has damage immunity 5 against that creature's abilities. When the bonecage is force moved, any creature or object they have grabbed moves with them.
While grabbed this way, a target can't teleport or be teleported.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The bonecage can put up to two 90-degree bends in each of the lines. Each target makes an Agility test.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is difficult terrain for enemies. The effect ends at the end of the encounter or when the bonecage uses this ability again.

features.name: Fingernails
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The crawling claw shifts up to a number of squares equal to the damage dealt.
Allies can't flank with the crawling claw.

features.name: Bone Bow
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The decrepit skeleton chooses one other target within distance, who takes 1 damage.
When the decrepit skeleton is reduced to 0 Stamina, their space is difficult terrain. The first time any enemy enters this space, the take 1 damage and the effect end.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A 3-cube area of ground centered on the target is difficult terrain for enemies.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target frightened this way is frightened of all undead. This effect ends early if the mournling is destroyed.
The first time the mournling is reduced to 0 Stamina by damage that isn't fire damage or holy damage and their body isn't destroyed, they instead have 15 Stamina and fall prone.
The mournling's shape can't be changed by any external effect.
Whenever the mournling uses the Dig maneuver to breach the surface, they make a free strike against each adjacent enemy.

features.name: Hollow Grasp
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This weakened condition ends if an affected target ends their turn with no spirit within 5 squares of them.

The spirit can move through creatures and objects at their usual speed, but can't end their turn inside a creature or object. The first time in a round that the spirit moves through a creature, that creature takes 4 corruption damage. The spirit doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target can't shift until the end of their next turn.
This ability targets one additional target.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target who is still frightened this way at the end of the encounter can't take a respite activity during their next respite.
The first time the mournling is reduced to 0 Stamina by damage that isn't fire damage or holy damage and their body isn't destroyed, they instead have 10 Stamina and fall prone.
The mournling's shape can't be changed by any external effect.

features.name: Bone Carvers
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If this ability gains an edge or has a double edge, the target is bleeding (save ends).
Any adjacent enemy who grabs the fleshflayed shambler or uses melee ability against them takes 2 damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The next strike made against the target gains an edge.

features.name: Haunt
features.target: Self or one ally with a Phasing trait

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target shifts up to their speed.
The ghost chooses one additional target.

features.name: Shriek
features.trigger: A creature within distance targets the ghost with a strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The ghost halves the damage from the strike and the target takes 2 sonic damage.
Each undead with a Phasing trait within 10 squares of the ghost can't be made slowed or weakened.

features.name: Paranormal Activity
features.target: Each size 3 or smaller object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target rises 1 square into the air and is vertically pulled up to 5 squares toward the nearest enemy within 3 squares of the target.

effects.tier3: P < 3 the target is levitated until the end of the encounter

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A levitated target floats 1 square off the ground when first affected, then rises 1 square at the end of each of their turns. If a levitated target can't already fly, they can fly but are slowed and weakened while flying this way.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target who has P < 2 is reduced to 1 Stamina if they are winded after taking this damage.

The ghost can move through creatures and objects at their usual speed, but can't end their turn inside a creature or object. The first time in a round that the ghost moves through a creature, that creature takes 2 corruption damage. The ghost doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

features.name: Taste
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability has a double edge against a bleeding target.
Any enemy adjacent to three or more ghoul cravers can't shift.
When the ghoul craver uses the Charge main action, they gain a +2 bonus to speed until the end of their turn.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The ghoul jumps up to 3 squares. If they land on a size 1 enemy, that enemy is knocked prone and the ghoul can make a free strike against them.
The first time the ghoul is reduced to 0 Stamina by damage that isn't fire damage or holy damage and their body isn't destroyed, they instead have 1 Stamina and fall prone.
When the ghoul uses the Charge main action, they gain a +2 bonus to speed until the end of their turn.

features.name: Rotten Kick
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: Each ally adjacent to the shambler has damage immunity 3.

features.name: Knocking Heads
features.trigger: The giant zombie grabs two creatures or objects, or starts their turn with two creatures or objects grabbed.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The creatures or objects are smashed together using Rotten Smash, which has a double edge.
The first time the giant zombie is reduced to 0 Stamina by damage that isn't fire damage or holy damage and their body isn't destroyed, they instead have 50 Stamina and fall prone.
When the giant zombie is targeted by an ability that deals rolled damage, they halve the damage from a tier 1 outcome.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target is force moved into another creature's space, that creature takes an additional 4 damage and the haunt slides them up to 2 squares.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target knocked prone this way can't use the Stand Up maneuver on themself while any haunt is within 20 squares of them.

The haunt can move through creatures and objects at their usual speed, but can't end their turn inside a creature or object. They are invisible while moving using a move action. The haunt doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

features.name: Hollowbone Slug
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each creature adjacent to the target takes 2 damage.
The hollowbone launcher explodes when they are reduced to 0 Stamina, dealing 2 damage to each adjacent creature.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A creature grabbed this way is suffocating. The koptourok can have up to two creatures grabbed at once.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability gains an edge against any target grabbed by the koptourok. If one or more targets are pulled adjacent to the koptourok, the koptourok can fly until the end of the encounter.

The first time the koptourok is made winded by damage that isn't fire damage or holy damage, each enemy within 3 squares of them takes 8 corruption damage. Any enemy who takes this damage and has M < 3 is also weakened (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A creature frightened this way takes a bane on any ability that targets undead.

features.name: Mystic Battery
features.trigger: A creature within distance uses a magic ability.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any damage dealt by or Stamina regained from the ability is halved. The lithgekh regains Stamina equal to the remaining damage dealt or Stamina gained.
Each ally within 10 squares of the lithgekh gains an edge on magic abilities.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: While the target is bleeding this way, the potency of any ability used against them increases by 1 for the target.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: While frightened this way, a target takes 4 psychic damage whenever they use a move action.
This ability targets one additional target for each 2 Malice spent.

features.name: Summon My Guard
features.trigger: The mummy lord is made winded for the first time in the encounter.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: One mummy or four ghoul cravers appear within distance.
At the end of each of their turns, the mummy lord can take 10 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.
The effect that is ended is transferred to another creature within 10 squares.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target takes a bane on their next strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The mummy lord gains a +2 bonus to speed and can automatically burrow at full speed while moving. They can then use the Dig maneuver. The next time the mummy lord breaches the surface, each enemy within 2 squares of the mummy lord makes an **Agility test**.

effects.tier3: 10 corruption damage; I < 4 frightened and restrained (save ends)

features.name: Fetid Wrappings
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each ally gains an edge on strikes made against the target until the end of the round.

effects.tier3: 10 corruption damage; pull 2; M < 3 restrained (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The next ability the mummy uses against the target has any potency increased by 1 for the target.

effects.tier1: 3 corruption damage; I < 1 the target is cursed (save ends)
effects.tier2: 5 corruption damage; I < 2 the target is cursed (save ends)
effects.tier3: 7 corruption damage; I < 3 the target is cursed (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A cursed target is bleeding and weakened, and allies gain an edge on strikes made against them.

features.name: Blast of Mummy Dust
features.trigger: The mummy comes within distance of a restrained creature or starts their turn within distance of one.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target takes 8 poison damage.

features.name: Rotting Fist
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.tier3: 5 damage; M < 2 prone if size 1, or slowed (save ends) otherwise

effects.effect: When the rotting zombie is reduced to 0 Stamina, their space is difficult terrain. The first time any enemy who has M < 2 enters this space, they are slowed (save ends) and the effect ends.

features.name: Life Drain
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.tier3: 5 corruption damage; the target must move up to their speed and can't end that movement closer to any shade

effects.effect: The shade can move through creatures and objects at their usual speed, but can't end their turn inside a creature or object. The first time in a round that the shade moves through a creature, that creature takes 1 corruption damage. The shade doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

features.name: Four Swords Swing
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: If the knight is reduced to 0 Stamina, their bones collapse to fill their space with an impassable barrier. Any enemy who comes adjacent to the barrier for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 5 damage.
Whenever the knight makes a free strike, they can make two free strikes instead.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the start of the skeleton's next turn, the target takes 2 damage the first time they willingly move on their turn.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target takes a bane on their next strike.
The first time the skeleton is reduced to 0 Stamina by damage that isn't fire damage or holy damage and their body isn't destroyed, they instead have 1 Stamina and fall prone.

effects.tier3: 5 corruption damage; M < 2 slowed and weakened (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target appears to rapidly age each time they take damage from this ability. The target regains their former appearance when the soulwight is destroyed.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target regains 10 Stamina. The soulwight can't use this maneuver again until after they strike a creature with their Soulstealer Longsword.
The first time the soulwight is reduced to 0 Stamina by damage that isn't fire damage or holy damage and their body isn't destroyed, they instead have 1 Stamina and fall prone.
The potency increases by 1. Any living creature who dies from this damage rises at the start of the next round in the target's space as a specter under the Director's control.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The specter turns invisible, moves up to their speed, and is visible again.

The specter can move through creatures and objects at their usual speed, but can't end their turn inside a creature or object. The first time in a round that the specter moves through a creature, that creature takes 2 corruption damage. The specter doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

effects.tier2: 6 cold damage; the stalker can shift 1 square
effects.tier3: 7 cold damage; the stalker shifts up to 2 squares

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the end of the stalker's next turn, the area provides concealment, and blocks line of effect for enemies.
The umbral stalker teleports to an unoccupied space in an area of concealment within 10 squares.

The umbral stalker can move through creatures and objects at their usual speed, but can't end their turn inside a creature or object. The first time in a round that the umbral stalker moves through a creature, that creature takes 2 corruption damage. The umbral stalker doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The vampire regains Stamina equal to half the damage dealt, and can end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw.
The vampire shifts 3 after striking the last target, and can target one additional creature for every 2 malice spent.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Two blood-starved vampires appear in unoccupied spaces within distance.

features.name: Redirected Charm
features.trigger: A creature makes a strike against the vampire.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target becomes the new target of the strike.
The vampire has speed 15 and an edge on power rolls while any creature within 20 squares of them is bleeding. Any bleeding creature within 5 squares of the vampire can't hide.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target who has P < 4 is now bleeding (save ends).

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The vampire turns to mist, filling the area. Until the end of the round, the vampire can't move or be targeted by abilities, but they can use Crimson Embrace against a target in the area. The vampire reforms in an unoccupied space in the area at the end of the round.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target is marked for sacrifice. At the end of the round, each target who isn't dead or destroyed takes 50 corruption damage. The vampire then uses the following ability.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes a **Might test**. This ability deals an extra 5 damage for each creature killed by the Sacrifice villain action.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The vampire spawn regains Stamina equal to any corruption damage dealt.
The target takes an additional 3 corruption damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The vampire spawn can shift 1 square, then move up to their speed. The next ability the vampire uses before the start of their next turn gains an edge.
The vampire spawn has speed 10 while any creature within 10 squares of them is bleeding. The vampire spawn must use Exsanguinating Bite against a bleeding creature on their turn if they are able to.

effects.tier2: 10 corruption damage; M < 3 5 corruption damage and bleeding (save ends)
effects.tier3: 11 corruption damage; M < 4 7 corruption damage and bleeding (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The vampire regains Stamina equal to any corruption damage dealt.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target is bleeding, the vampire shifts up to their speed before using this ability.

features.name: Reactive Charm
features.trigger: A creature makes a strike against the vampire.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target becomes the new target of the strike.
The vampire has speed 10 while any creature within 10 squares of them is bleeding. The vampire must make a strike against a bleeding creature on their turn if they are able to.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If a target made slowed this way is already slowed, they are instead restrained (save ends).

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the waxen is ignited (see Burn Bright), they shift up to their speed before using this ability. Each target makes an **Agility test**.
The waxen is then destroyed and the area is difficult terrain for enemies.
If the waxen takes fire damage, they ignite. While ignited, the waxen takes 4 fire damage at the start of each of their turns and their strikes deal an extra 4 fire damage.

features.name: Draining Rake
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.tier1: 4 cold damage; the wraith can shift 1 square
effects.tier2: 7 cold damage; the wraith shifts up to 2 square
effects.tier3: 9 cold damage; P < 5 slowed (save ends); the wraith shifts up to 3 squares

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The wraith turns invisible until the start of their next turn.

The wraith can move through creatures and objects at their usual speed, but can't end their turn inside a creature or object. The first time in a round that the wraith moves through a creature, that creature takes 5 corruption damage. The wraith doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any living creature who dies from this damage rises at the start of the next round as a ghoul craver under the Director's control.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The wraith turns invisible, moves up to their speed, and is visible again.

features.name: Stolen Vitality
features.trigger: An enemy within distance regains Stamina.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target regains only half the Stamina, and the wraith regains the remaining Stamina.

The wraith can move through creatures and objects at their usual speed, but can't end their turn inside a creature or object. The first time in a round that the wraith moves through a creature, that creature takes 5 corruption damage and takes a bane on their next strike. The wraith doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target who starts their turn grabbed by the zombie takes 2 corruption damage. A creature who takes 5 or more corruption damage this way becomes insatiably hungry for flesh, and must complete the Find a Cure downtime project in Draw Steel: Heroes to end this effect.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The zombie falls prone, expelling a wave of rot and dust.
The first time the zombie is reduced to 0 Stamina by damage that isn't fire damage or holy damage and their body isn't destroyed, they instead have 10 Stamina and fall prone.
